description: A color photograph of three honor-guard members in dark dress uniforms with wide-brimmed hats, gold shoulder cords and white gloves, standing at attention with heads bowed. The nearest wears a patch reading 'HONOR GUARD U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. An American flag is at left. There is no overlaid text on the image.
notable_text: HONOR GUARD; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
